verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All I want for others to see Is a reflection of You inside of me Like the sun on the still water Let me be a mirror of Your heart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I want to walk in the image of You Like a child imitating What would his father would do A mirror of Your heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I want to be Your disciple An example, the way You were to me And as I see Your humble perfection Let me be a mirror of Your heart
